channel.title: Off The Rails: Federico Sapuppo
channel.description: Field notes from a Ruby on Rails developer. Bug autopsies, refactor diaries, and lessons from the Rails Way.

item.title: Sergio rides shotgun
item.description: Filing a tax return without opening a browser, drafting a labor settlement from a voice memo at a toll booth, and turning a Hermes deploy into a product.
item.author: fedesapuppo@gmail.com (Federico Sapuppo)

item.title: From 3 AM deploys to a notifications skill: shipping web push with Noticed and AI help
item.description: Migrating 25 legacy mailers to email + PWA web push at scale, building a reusable skill, and chasing a nasty cross-user subscription bug.
item.author: fedesapuppo@gmail.com (Federico Sapuppo)

item.title: If your MacBook falls off a desk, install Omarchy
item.description: From a cracked M3 Pro to a batch of merged PRs in Omarchy 3.5, plus one kernel patch for the T2 SMC.
item.author: fedesapuppo@gmail.com (Federico Sapuppo)
